trends.trend_title: OpenAI Acquires AI Security Startup Promptfoo
trends.summary: OpenAI Group PBC announced its plan to acquire Promptfoo Inc., a startup specializing in AI application testing and security evaluation, for an undisclosed amount. Promptfoo's technology will be integrated into OpenAI Frontier, enhancing the platform's capability to detect and fix security issues in AI models used in critical business operations.
evidence_snippets: [TechCrunch AI] This deal underscores how frontier labs are scrambling to prove their technology can be used safely in critical business operations.

[SiliconAngle]

OpenAI Group PBC announced today that it plans to acquire testing and security evaluation platform for artificial intelligence applications startup Promptfoo Inc.
[ET Tech] OpenAI plans to acquire Promptfoo, a startup that helps businesses detect and fix security issues in AI models during development.

trends.trend_title: Synaptics Launches New AI Edge Solutions
trends.summary: On March 10, 2026, Synaptics Incorporated announced multiple product launches including the next-generation Coral Dev Board in collaboration with Google Research, the SYN765x AI-native Wi-Fi 7 solution for IoT edge applications, and expansions to its Astra Edge AI portfolio with the SR80 series for premium audio and SRW1500 series for connected distributed intelligence. These innovations aim to enhance multimodal edge AI and integrated IoT capabilities. All announcements were made from Synaptics' headquarters in San Jose, California.

trends.trend_title: Ramco Systems Tata Defence MRO Deal
trends.summary: Ramco Systems shares surged 10.5% intraday to Rs 445 on the NSE following a new deal with Tata for Defence Maintenance, Repair, and Overhaul (MRO). This rise significantly outpaced the benchmark Nifty 50 index, which only gained 0.9% during the same period. The partnership marks a strategic move for Ramco Systems in the defence sector.

trends.trend_title: Kotak Mahindra Bank Eyes Billion-Dollar Deals
trends.summary: Kotak Mahindra Bank, led by CEO Ashok Vaswani, is actively exploring acquisitions to deploy its surplus capital, supported by a strong capital-to-risk ratio of 22.6%. The bank is open to deals exceeding $1 billion, focusing on targets that align with its strategic fit.
evidence_snippets: [ET Industry] Kotak Mahindra Bank is exploring acquisitions to deploy its surplus capital and expand its scale, CEO Ashok Vaswani said.

trends.trend_title: Cboe Global Markets Prediction Market Framework
trends.summary: Cboe Global Markets, a leading derivatives and securities exchange network, announced a new prediction markets framework aimed at transforming outcome-based trading. This innovative platform seeks to redefine user engagement with prediction markets, positioning Cboe at the forefront of this emerging financial technology.

trends.trend_title: OPPO Find N6 Global Launch March 17
trends.summary: OPPO announced the global launch of its Find N6 foldable smartphone on March 17, featuring a zero-feel crease design. This launch highlights OPPO's innovation in foldable display technology, aiming to compete in the premium smartphone segment.

trends.trend_title: Yes Sir Startup Expands Men-Only Massage Services
trends.summary: Kolkata-based startup Yes Sir secured funding in early 2026 to expand its men-only at-home massage and grooming services across India. This move reflects growing niche service startups gaining investor interest, alongside a 12% rise in early-stage funding for women co-founded tech startups in India reported in 2025. The broader Indian startup ecosystem also saw notable developments including Pink Adrak's funding and Zopper's IPO plans.

trends.trend_title: Kast Raises $80 Million Series A Funding
trends.summary: Kast, a stablecoin-based global financial platform founded by former Circle executive Raagulan Pathy, secured $80 million in a Series A round co-led by QED Investors and Left Lane Capital. This significant funding aims to accelerate Kast's growth in the stablecoin financial services sector.

trends.trend_title: No actionable MariaDB acquisition event detected
trends.summary: MariaDB Plc announced the acquisition of GridGain Systems Inc., the creator of Apache Ignite and an in-memory computing pioneer, to enhance its data processing capabilities for AI agents. This move aims to strengthen MariaDB's infrastructure for artificial intelligence applications, accelerating performance and scalability. The deal reflects MariaDB's strategic focus on AI-driven database management solutions.
